title: How to infer age from employee's date of birth
excerpt: For example, I was born in 1989, how to directly display 32 years old

posts.author: chen1 (陈慧民)
posts.cookedHtml: For example, I was born in 1989, how to directly display 32 years old

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, @chen1 - You can add a Formula column that calculates the age:

IF({DOB}<>"",ROUND(ABS(DIVIDE(DAYS(TODAY(),{DOB}),365)),0),"")

should work

posts.author: chen1 (陈慧民)
posts.cookedHtml:
it works thank you !

Hello, @chen1 - You can add a Formula column that calculates the age:

IF({DOB}<>"",ROUND(ABS(DIVIDE(DAYS(TODAY(),{DOB}),365)),0),"")

should work

posts.author: almostrice (Toan Ho)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the post. I needed it too, but I needed age before birthday this year too. I modified your formula for my application. Posting this if someone else needs it. should be accurate to +/- 1 day.

IF({Birthday}<>"",TRUNC(ABS(DIVIDE(DAYS(TODAY(),{Birthday}),365.25)),0),"")
